# sedai_group_settings (Data Source)

Read the current settings for a Sedai group. Returns the availability/optimization modes and all per-resource-type block values as they exist on the backend.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group_id` (String) The ID of the group to read settings for.

### Read-Only

- `app_settings` (Block, Read-only) Per-resource-type settings for generic application workloads. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--app_settings))
- `availability_mode` (String) The group's current availability mode (`DATA_PILOT`, `CO_PILOT`, or `AUTO`).
- `bucket_settings` (Block, Read-only) Per-resource-type settings for S3 buckets. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--bucket_settings))
- `container_app_settings` (Block, Read-only) Per-resource-type settings for containerized workloads. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--container_app_settings))
- `ecs_app_settings` (Block, Read-only) Per-resource-type settings for AWS ECS service workloads. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--ecs_app_settings))
- `kube_app_settings` (Block, Read-only) Per-resource-type settings for Kubernetes workloads. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--kube_app_settings))
- `optimization_mode` (String) The group's current optimization mode (`DATA_PILOT`, `CO_PILOT`, or `AUTO`).
- `sedai_sync_enabled` (Boolean) Whether Sedai auto-syncs the group's resources with the latest configuration.
- `serverless_settings` (Block, Read-only) Per-resource-type settings for AWS Lambda functions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--serverless_settings))
- `volume_settings` (Block, Read-only) Per-resource-type settings for AWS EBS volumes. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--volume_settings))

<a id="nestedblock--app_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `app_settings`

Read-Only:

- `availability_mode` (String)
- `horizontal_scaling_enabled` (Boolean)
- `horizontal_scaling_max_replicas` (Number)
- `horizontal_scaling_min_replicas` (Number)
- `is_prod` (Boolean)
- `optimization_mode` (String)
- `sedai_sync_enabled` (Boolean)
